Name: DAMAGE_MOVEMENT_POWER_PARAM
Description: Defines movement force values applied by attacks, including additional force used when objects or guards are broken.

Fields.Name: Movement Power [m/sec]
Fields.Description: Base movement force or knockback velocity applied by the attack.

Fields.Name: Broken Movement Power [m/sec]
Fields.Description: Movement force or knockback velocity applied when weapon used for the attack is broken.
